subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and the attraction of the friends of Kasha to the holy fragrances was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه آنجناب رسید و از انجذاب احبای کشه بنفحات قدس روح و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
